body_excerpt: {"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/840125?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rudloff/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rudloff/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rudloff/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rudloff/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Rudloff", "id": 840125, "login": "Rudloff", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjg0MDEyNQ==", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rudloff/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rudloff/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rudloff/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rudloff/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rudloff/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rudloff", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-49977", "cvss": {"score": 4.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-285", "name": "Improper Authorization"}], "description": "### Summary tarteaucitron provides a list of cookies and buttons to delete them. If an attacker can write HTML with data attributes, they could create an element that silently deletes a cookie when clicked and trick a user to delete this cookie. ### Details `tarteaucitron.cookie.purge()` is called on any element with the `purgeBtn` class. It does not check if the element is a legitimate tarteaucitron button or if the cookie corresponds to a service handled by tarteaucitron. ### PoC ```html Click me! ``` If someone has a cookie with this name and clicks on the link, the cookie is silently deleted. ### Impact The impact is limited because this only works on cookies without HttpOnly=true and the attacker has to know the name of the cookie.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00349, "percentile": 0.2717}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-jxj7-g6gm-49j7", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-10T16:05:00Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jxj7-g6gm-49j7", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-jxj7-g6gm-49j7"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-49977"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-10T16:05:00Z", "references": ["https://github.com/AmauriC/tarteaucitron.js/security/advisories/GHSA-jxj7-g6gm-49j7", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jxj7-g6gm-49j7"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/AmauriC/tarteaucitron.js/security-advisories/GHSA-jxj7-g6gm-49j7", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/AmauriC/tarteaucitron.js", "summary": "tarteaucitron: data-cookie attribute can be used to delete arbitrary cookies", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-10T16:05:02Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-jxj7-g6gm-49j7", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.33.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "tarteaucitronjs"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.33.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: tarteaucitron: data-cookie attribute can be used to delete arbitrary cookies
